event: scheduled to undergo left lobe hepatectomy
sudden decrease in arterial blood pressure (systolic <40 mmHg)
resuscitation with catecholamines (epinephrine 1 mg, norepinephrine infusion)
intraoperative ultrasonography revealed air emboli in left and right heart
ABGA at 30 minutes: SaO2 99.6% on FiO2 1.0
air emboli in left heart disappeared
ST elevation in II, III, aVF
brain CT and MRI showing multiple cerebral infarctions
weaned to CPAP mode at POD 11
expired due to cardiac arrest from septic shock
